news.title: Strategy Pauses Bitcoin Buying To Retire Converts And Add Treasuries
news.summary: Strategy Inc (NasdaqGS:MSTR) has paused its aggressive Bitcoin purchases to prioritize a major convertible bond repurchase. The company is buying back US$1.5b in convertible notes at a discount instead of adding to its Bitcoin position. This is the first significant pause in Strategy’s multi year Bitcoin acquisition program.
